page.featureDescription: Send and receive Telegram messages with your customers directly from Torqvoice.

notConfigured.title: Telegram Not Configured
notConfigured.description: Set up a Telegram bot to send and receive messages with your customers. Create a bot via @BotFather and configure it in settings.

threads.title: Conversations
threads.empty: No Telegram conversations yet. Customers can start chatting by messaging your bot.
threads.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete all Telegram messages with {name}. This action cannot be undone.

conversation.notLinked: This customer hasn't connected to your Telegram bot yet. Share the bot link to connect them.
conversation.empty: No messages yet. Send the first message to {name}.
conversation.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this message. This action cannot be undone.
